value.found_quote: They are packaged in the toolset `BigQueryToolset`.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes BigQueryToolset as a managed tool connector for BigQuery available in ADK Python v1.1.0. It packages a set of BigQuery integration tools (list_dataset_ids, get_dataset_info, list_table_ids, get_table_info, get_job_info, execute_sql, forecast, analyze_contribution, detect_anomalies, ask_data_insights, search_catalog) for use in ADK agents, directly substantiating the claim. The page shows it as generally available (supported in ADK Python v1.1.0) with no indication of preview or deprecation.
